_Finn, Jake and Marceline are trapped in an underground cavern with no red in sight. If Marceline doesn't feed, she will turn into a vampiric beast and suck out all of Jake's blood! Finn heads off to explore the cave and find something red to satiate her until they can be rescued._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2002188_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
